form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.11) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from three starts. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Rockhampton over 407m (23.93) beating Jackpot Junior in Grade 5 on April 12. Can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Rockhampton over 407m (23.93) beating Jackpot Junior in Grade 5 on April 12. Can win again.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 6 length fourth over 352m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.46) over 520m at Q Parklands. Awkward draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.46) over 520m at Q Parklands. Awkward draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: In rare form with a current sequence of three wins on the hop. Added to the tally last start when she won by 1.75 lengths at this track (25.38) beating Hara's Hazel in a Grade 6 on April 11. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.95) when seventh over 520m at Q Parklands in a Mix 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.
